summary: Sales Pipeline Feature testing completed successfully. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All widgets and course selection modal working correctly. Pipeline Revenue and Expected Commission widgets display on Sales Dashboard. Course selection modal appears when moving leads to pipeline stages (warm_lead, hot_lead, in_progress).
passed_tests: Backend: Login successful with super admin credentials
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/pipeline-revenue requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/pipeline-revenue returns correct structure with stages and summary
Backend: Pipeline revenue values are numeric
Backend: Pipeline revenue works with view_as parameter for managers
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/expected-commission requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/expected-commission returns correct structure with summary, stage_breakdown, pipeline_leads
Backend: Expected commission values are numeric
Backend: Expected commission month format is YYYY-MM
Backend: GET /api/leads endpoint accessible with course fields
Backend: GET /api/courses endpoint returns courses with id, name, base_price
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats endpoint working
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/lead-funnel endpoint working
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/leaderboard endpoint working
Frontend: Sales Dashboard loads with Pipeline Revenue Widget (data-testid='pipeline-revenue-widget')
Frontend: Sales Dashboard loads with Expected Commission Widget (data-testid='expected-commission-widget')
Frontend: Pipeline Revenue shows Active Pipeline, Won (Enrolled), Lost (Rejected) values
Frontend: Pipeline Revenue shows stage breakdown (Warm Lead, Hot Lead, In Progress, Enrolled)
Frontend: Expected Commission shows Expected (Pipeline), Earned This Month, Total Receivable
Frontend: Expected Commission shows Pipeline Breakdown by stage
Frontend: Sales CRM Kanban board loads with 8 columns
Frontend: Lead cards display with name, phone, email, country, SLA badges
Frontend: Lead Detail modal opens on card click
Frontend: Lead Detail modal shows 'Move to Stage' dropdown with all stages
Frontend: Course Interest Required section appears when selecting Warm Lead stage
Frontend: Course Interest Required section appears when selecting Hot Lead stage
Frontend: Course Interest Required section appears when selecting In Progress stage
Frontend: Course/Package Interested dropdown present with 'Select course' placeholder
Frontend: Estimated Value (AED) input present with 'Auto-filled from course' placeholder
Frontend: Follow-up Date picker appears for pipeline stages
critical_code_review_comments: Pipeline Revenue API correctly aggregates lead values by stage with course breakdown
Expected Commission API calculates commission based on commission rules or default 5%
Lead model properly includes interested_course_id and estimated_value fields
SalesCRMPage correctly validates course selection before allowing pipeline stage changes
PipelineRevenueWidget and ExpectedCommissionWidget properly fetch and display data
All data-testid attributes present for critical UI elements
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Pipeline feature is complete and working. Key components: 1) Pipeline Revenue Widget shows revenue by stage (warm_lead, hot_lead, in_progress, enrolled, rejected) with course breakdown; 2) Expected Commission Widget shows expected, earned, and total receivable commission; 3) When moving a lead to warm_lead/hot_lead/in_progress stages, a 'Course Interest Required' section appears with mandatory course selection and estimated value fields; 4) Lead cards in pipeline stages show interested course and estimated value. All APIs tested: /api/dashboard/pipeline-revenue, /api/dashboard/expected-commission. Note: Most leads don't have course interest set yet, so commission values show AED 0.

feature_verification.GET /api/dashboard/pipeline-revenue: WORKING - Returns stages array with count, total_value, course_breakdown; summary with active_pipeline_value, enrolled_value, rejected_value, total_potential
feature_verification.GET /api/dashboard/expected-commission: WORKING - Returns summary with total_pipeline_value, expected_commission, earned_this_month, actual_pending, actual_paid, total_receivable; stage_breakdown; pipeline_leads; month
feature_verification.PipelineRevenueWidget: WORKING - Renders on Sales Dashboard with stage funnel visualization
feature_verification.ExpectedCommissionWidget: WORKING - Renders on Sales Dashboard with commission projections
feature_verification.Course Selection Modal: WORKING - Appears when selecting warm_lead/hot_lead/in_progress stages
feature_verification.Lead Card with Course/Value: WORKING - Structure in place, displays when lead has interested_course_id set
